_doc: Curated EDITORIAL verdicts (and, where established, the public candidate) for rows whose taxonomy/choice is a human judgment, not a structured fact. STATUS.csv lumps these under 'visual_only'; metric_safe rows are NOT here (derived structurally from verified_shipped / layout_proven_all_faces, candidate from STATUS). This file owns ONLY the verdict + optional candidate; the importer attaches gates/advance/provenance mechanically from structured sources, and ONLY for the named candidate - it never anoints a substitute by closest advance. A row WITH a candidate is emitted only if a structured advance exists for THAT candidate; a row WITHOUT a candidate publishes candidate:null and shows the closest measured fonts only in a top_candidates measurement.

aptos.rationale: No open metric clone; the closest open font reflows. Customer-supplied first, else a reported visual fallback.

consolas.rationale: Monospace cell-width match only (single advance ratio), not shape-proven; no italic face.

lucida-console.rationale: Monospace cell-width match only; not shape/code-font proven.

comic-sans-ms.rationale: Category-correct visual fallback (the established open Comic Sans alternative); advance too far for metric fidelity.

verdana.rationale: No human-approved visual substitute yet; closest measured fonts are reported, not anointed.

tahoma.rationale: No human-approved visual substitute yet; closest measured fonts are reported, not anointed. The closest lead, Viga, was reviewed for promotion and declined: its low mean (~0.6%) hides broad reflow - worst glyphs include punctuation such as > and <, the space character diverges ~26%, and 120+ glyphs exceed the near-metric band. This is not a single-glyph exception. Viga has reviewed corpus provenance (promoted-google-fonts) if a stronger case emerges.

trebuchet-ms.rationale: No human-approved visual substitute yet; closest measured fonts are reported, not anointed.

candara.rationale: No human-approved visual substitute yet; closest measured fonts are reported, not anointed.

constantia.rationale: No human-approved visual substitute yet; closest measured fonts are reported, not anointed.

corbel.rationale: No human-approved visual substitute yet; closest measured fonts are reported, not anointed.
